description: Create a two-column content slide titled About Accenture Song with a callout statement and explanatory text about touchpoints and customer relevance.

header.headline: About Accenture Song
header.sub: It’s all about touchpoints—where relevance and emotion happen.

left.body: Each one of these touchpoints must be a harmonious blend of strategy, creativity, design, technology and intelligence to create customer value that drives enterprise value. If any of these elements fall short, the touchpoint becomes less effective—and the opportunity to build a relationship is compromised. Relevance is thoughtfully written in at the granular level and manifests in the numerous touchpoints where brand and customer come together.

right.body:
Accenture Song orchestrates a diversity of talents, skills and experience to drive relevance, by harmonizing every touchpoint across the customer experience. Because relevance is not an accident—it is built. Hence Accenture Life Trends, which aim to help organizations deeply understand the context of what is happening when people and brands interact.

The breadth of skills and the depth of experience at Accenture Song enables us to ensure our clients remain powerfully relevant in their customers’ lives, turning every touchpoint into a connection, and building every connection into a lasting relationship.
